name: DINX Social Club
address: 1931 Skokie Valley Rd, Highland Park, IL 60035
about: DINX Social Club is an upscale indoor social club offering Pickleball and golf activities on Long Island. The venue features five regulation-sized Pickleball courts and a private court, alongside three Trackman iO golf simulator bays. It provides a climate-controlled environment year-round with multiple lounge areas, a private VIP lounge with karaoke, and a full-service food and drink program. DINX operates on a membership basis, offering priority booking, and caters to a wide range of activities from casual play to leagues and private events.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art Trackman iO simulator bays with advanced ball flight analysis
Climate-controlled environment allowing play year-round on famous championship courses
Social and competitive league play with flexible booking options for members
Combination of golf with a full bar and lounge experience

food_and_drink.notes: Grab & Go menu with tasty, healthy food made fresh daily, plus curated food trucks.
Self-serve pour wall with curated wines, spirits, cocktails, mocktails, and craft beers.

simulator_hardware.notes: Three simulator bays offering advanced ball flight analysis and precision swing metrics.

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you must bring your own golf clubs to use the simulators.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, outside food and drinks are not permitted. DINX offers its own Grab & Go menu and a self-serve pour wall.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing time varies depending on group size and pace, but a typical 18-hole round can take between 1.5 to 2 hours in a simulator bay.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, DINX offers youth programs and camps, making it suitable for families with children.
